untranslatable_reason: Signal references gap opening 'next day' which requires forward-looking data not available in backtest. Success rates, average rise/decline percentages, failure rates, volume trends, and throwback/pullback percentages are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be quantified. Exact candle color weighting for bear market bias is not numerically specified.
translation_notes: Interpreted candlestick breakout pattern as: (1) price position relative to sma_50 determines direction, (2) candle body size indicates volatility/breakout strength, (3) close vs open determines color bias (close > open = bullish/white, close < open = bearish/black). Exit uses sma_50 crossing as reversal signal. Gap opening condition cannot be backtested with standard indicators. Parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT suggest empirical ranges should be added by trader.
